transcript: Speaker A: भारत की राजधानी क्या है? [What is the capital of India?]
on_screen_text:
भारत की राजधानी क्या है? [What is the capital of India?]
A. मुंबई [A. Mumbai]
B. नई दिल्ली [B. New Delhi]
C. चेन्नई [C. Chennai]
अपने परिवार का सबसे अमीर आदमी बनने के लिए Download कीजिये Zinglish App 😍 [To become the richest person in your family, download Zinglish App 😍]
summary: The ad begins with a trivia question about India's capital to hook the viewer, followed by a demonstration of the Zinglish app translating an English bank SMS into Hindi. It ends with a call to action to download the app from the Play Store.
